pending.note: Directe £3-toezegging voor issue #97081; PR is open en mergeable, maar nog niet gemerged of betaald.
Een ingediende security-review-bijdrage wacht op beoordeling. De 9,25-USDC-nettopool is gedeeld tussen 311 inzendingen; er is geen individuele opbrengst bevestigd.

sources.result: Authenticated primary-source search of open, bounty-labelled issues created on 2026-07-21 (excluding known generated bounty-board clusters) returned NashKara96/resty#1 and the two active Tenstorrent bounties. Each issue, its comments, related PR search, and repository metadata were re-fetched.

Open, created 2026-07-21T15:18:34Z, but the just-created repository had no credible project history (created 17 seconds earlier, zero stars). Exact proposed reward was $10; the primary Opire bot immediately rejected /reward 10 because the platform minimum is $20. No valid funded payout exists.
Open $10,000 bounty, but officially assigned to jasondavies. The assigned contributor's open PR #50624 targets the work. Not available.
Open $1,500 bounty, but officially assigned to sreeshanth-soma; payout requires all three stated model bring-up stages. Not available.

Fresh, no-comment GrantFox-labelled issue was inspected as a low-competition control. Its label is only 'Maybe Rewarded' and the primary issue text gives no amount, payer, escrow, payout method, or payout trigger. Repository is new (created 2026-02-22), has zero stars, and no verified payment evidence; rejected as unverified payment.

All seven current open bounty-mode tasks were live-re-fetched with task get and the bounty-mode submissions list. Exact fetched submission/unique-worker counts: 62/32, 70/37, 111/35, 30/13, 394/59, 424/81, 202/66. Every task exceeds the maximum 10 unique-competitor gate. The first four also require or solicit x402 payment interactions; the seventh requires an EIP-3009 payment signature. No claims, pitches, bids, submissions, wallet reads, or other writes were performed.

The issue remains open but is explicitly fixed by the user's own open PR #97103, created 2026-07-21T10:57:35Z and updated 2026-07-21T12:33:22Z. It is not a new alert and no duplicate action was taken.

rejected.reason: No actual reward: Opire rejected the $10 /reward command; the stated minimum is $20. Newly created, zero-star repository gives no independently credible payment path.
Explicit official assignment to another contributor plus their open related PR #50624.
Explicit official assignment to another contributor.
Competition count is zero but payout is merely labelled 'Maybe Rewarded': exact amount, payer, payment method, trigger, and escrow are all absent.
All seven live open bounty-mode tasks had 13-81 unique visible workers, above the <=10 gate. Several also require payment/signature flows, which are excluded.

notes: Publieke snapshot. Geen walletadres, geheimen of financiële schrijfacties zijn gepubliceerd.
Alle bedragen onder ‘verdiend’ zijn alleen bevestigde betalingen; walletsaldo is geen inkomen.
De £3 GitHub-beloning is een directe, nog niet geverifieerde toezegging en telt niet mee voor het maanddoel.
Taskmarket-bountybeloningen zijn gedeelde pools; een ingediende bijdrage telt pas als verdiend na acceptatie en bevestigde betaling.
